Weekly Bulletin
Think before you click.
⚠ One bad click can cost everything — stop. look. report.

● See something suspicious?
Don't Click.
Don't Reply.
Report It.

Forward suspicious emails to the security team. Every report helps protect the entire organisation and enables the SOC to act faster.

Report to SOC Now → soc@abc-company.com
